LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JUN-23-2020 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT SAISON DINING GROUP, LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT SAISON DINING GROUP, LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY PROCEEDINGS IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED. (SEE WORD MINUTES AND SCANNED ORDER FOR COMPLETE RULING.) JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: MARIA A. TORREANO CSR#8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM (302/EPS)

MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT SAISON DINING GROUP, LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION.

No appearances made by the parties. The Court adopts its tentative ruling:

Defendant Saison Dining Group, LLC's motion to compel arbitration and stay proceedings is granted.

Order signed.

(See Word minutes and scanned order for complete ruling.)
